name: Oncosil Medical Ltd
analysis: OSL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 72% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.5900, stop A$0.4306, target A$0.6500 (0.38:1) — then trail it.
